text: 33. Subcontractor  shall  include  multiple  deliveries  as  required  for  installation  and  shall  coordinate  deliveries  with Contractor's Superintendent. Storage for materials will be on a per building basis as approved by Contractor's Superintendent. Additional storage for material will be the responsibility of the Subcontractor. Subcontractor shall inventory, verify material, verify breakage/damage from transport, etc. offsite at Subcontractor's storage facility.
